notableEvents.label: Nick Loftin GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Nick Loftin grounds into a double play, third baseman Junior Caminero to second baseman Richie Palacios to first baseman Jonathan Aranda. Salvador Perez out at 2nd. Nick Loftin out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Lane Thomas reached on error
